en: Hello everyone! Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: inabayan! garem i palaladam ku kanmu dra kemuda ta temarapuyuma marengay kana akanan.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的南王卑南語怎麼說。
en: A: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Puyuma.
A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, adri ku malradram. karuwa yu masalr marengay?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: adri ku kilrengaw. karuwa yu kematrina driya?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: nauwi driya kadri! kurenangi ku emaip pariyasalr.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
You read it very well.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sinsi, abalu ku kemasu dra tratruri.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sinsi, abalu ku kemasu dra iyasaus.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kibulas driya kan tu iyasaus kana risarisan i saninin.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pabulasi ku driya dra iyasaus. maw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: ta palruwanay temakesi kadrini. marepanauwa ta driya an masalr liyusan.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
